name: maritime_environment_reconciliation_job_kestrel_car_fair
premise: A Maritime Environment response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving maritime environment reconciliation job kestrel car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Sana Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Sana Vasquez, accountable for a defensible call in Maritime Environment when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Kaito Haddad
agents.identity: I am Kaito Haddad, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Maritime Environment.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Sana Vasquez must decide under care vs fairness. What does Sana Vasquez do?
